desc: Hi,     I am in the finanical services industry, and as most of you know the past 12 months have not been the best for many people who have invested, only to see their investments returns deliver below their expectations.     With that being said, I have had to revaluate how I conduct my business in terms of what a proper investment should be in these uncertain times.     The value of an investment should consider, what would be termed the 3 "P"s.      "Protect": the investment should be protected from any and all loses. Never a loss of a penny of capital. "It is easier to make a dollar than to make up a loss." Anon.      "Preserved": the investment should be long term in nature, and by understanding this issue, we add real value to our future.      "Prosper": the investment should be able to achieve superior returns.       After repositioning myself, with a new way of thinking for the benifit of my clients, I found an unique class asset, that combined the safety of T-bills, and the return of hedge funds.         Take a look at the web presentation:         nomarketrisk.com        Due to the start up cost, and the 90 day delay in being paid commissions, I am requesting a short term 36 month loan of $6,400.               This will allow me to pay my most basic expenses for the next 180 days, while I market this investment to new qualified clients.         Thank you for your consideration.
title: Working Capital
